prompt: Create a clean Japanese lifestyle advertisement poster for a futuristic compact home appliance that automatically folds laundry. Use a bright, airy, minimalist Scandinavian-style living room in the background with soft daylight, white walls, a light wood table, a sofa, and green plants near a window, all softly blurred to keep focus on the product. The main product is a sleek white rectangular machine with rounded corners on a tabletop, shown in a 3/4 front view, with its front door tray folded down and a neatly folded white T-shirt sliding outward from the machine. Add a faint digital display on the top front panel showing “04” and subtle modern control icons. Place a small stack of exactly 4 folded garments in the foreground at lower left: 3 white shirts and 1 pale blue shirt at the bottom. Use a premium consumer-electronics ad style, photorealistic product rendering, soft shadows, high-key lighting, gentle blue-gray accents, and a clean composition with lots of white space. At the top left, add very large blue Japanese headline text reading {argument name="headline text" default="置くだけ、4秒。"}. Beneath it, add a smaller dark gray Japanese subheadline reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="毎日の“たたむ”をゼロに。"}. On the left side below the subheadline, place 3 rounded rectangular feature badges stacked vertically, each with a blue outline icon and Japanese text: 1) a T-shirt icon with "Tシャツ・タオル対応", 2) a cube icon with "コンパクト設計", 3) a family icon with "家族みんなで使える". Along the bottom center, add exactly 4 minimalist blue line icons with labels separated evenly: 1) stopwatch icon with "最短４秒", 2) T-shirt outline icon with "サイズぴったり", 3) folded towel icon with "省スペース", 4) hand snap icon with "誰でも簡単". At the bottom left, add the product branding in a modern sans-serif layout: {argument name="product name" default="Foldy Home 20"} with smaller Japanese text below reading {argument name="product category" default="全自動服たたみ機"}. At the bottom right, display a large blue price reading {argument name="price" default="￥19,800"} with smaller gray text "（税込）". Include a subtle "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Vertical poster format, crisp commercial layout, realistic Japanese home-appliance catalog aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张简洁的日式生活方式广告海报，展示一款用于自动折叠衣物的未来感紧凑型家电。背景采用明亮、通透、极简的斯堪的纳维亚风格客厅，配以柔和的日光、白墙、浅色木桌、沙发以及窗边的绿植，背景需进行柔焦处理以突出产品。主体产品为一台放置在桌面上的圆角长方形白色机器，采用 3/4 正面视角，前置托盘放下，一件整齐折叠的白色 T 恤正从机器中滑出。在顶部前面板添加一个微弱的数字显示屏，显示“04”及精致的现代控制图标。在左下角前景处放置一叠共 4 件折叠好的衣物：底部为 3 件白色衬衫和 1 件淡蓝色衬衫。采用高端消费电子广告风格，照片级产品渲染，柔和阴影，高调照明，淡蓝灰色调，构图简洁并留有大量空白。在左上角添加超大的蓝色日文标题文本 {argument name="headline text" default="置くだけ、4秒。"}。在其下方添加较小的深灰色日文副标题 {argument name="subheadline text" default="毎日の“たたむ”をゼロに。"}。在副标题下方的左侧，垂直排列 3 个圆角矩形功能徽章，每个徽章配有蓝色轮廓图标和日文说明：1) T 恤图标配“Tシャツ・タオル対応”，2) 立方体图标配“コンパクト設計”，3) 家庭图标配“家族みんなで使える”。在底部中心处，均匀排列 4 个极简蓝色线条图标及标签：1) 秒表图标配“最短４秒”，2) T 恤轮廓图标配“サイズぴったり”，3) 折叠毛巾图标配“省スペース”，4) 响指图标配“誰でも簡単”。在左下角，以现代无衬线字体排版添加产品品牌名称：{argument name="product name" default="Foldy Home 20"}，下方配以较小的日文文本 {argument name="product category" default="全自動服たたみ機"}。在右下角，显示醒目的蓝色价格 {argument name="price" default="￥19,800"}，并附带较小的灰色文本“（税込）”。在右上角添加一个隐约的“Pollo.ai”水印。竖版海报格式，清晰的商业排版，呈现写实的日本家电目录美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日式自动折衣机广告：此提示词用于生成精美的日式产品广告海报，展示一款紧凑型自动折衣家电，适用于模拟营销视觉效果和概念宣传活动。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, minimalist, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
